official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and the chunk_batch_finished packet id.
Official binary source for constructing, decoding, and writing the chunk_batch_finished body without initialized game state.
Official binary source for the batchSize body shape.
Official binary source for writing and dispatch-decoding the full Play clientbound chunk_batch_finished frame.

field_notes.fixture: Uses official ClientboundChunkBatchFinishedPacket(int). The fixture is a context-free record constructor and does not require an initialized Level, chunk storage, or game state.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound chunk_batch_finished packet framing and dispatch/decode for one official batchSize fixture only; do not infer chunk batch pacing behavior, chunk-load completion, initialized game state, spawn readiness, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
